audit_items.proof_trace: Line 128 directly enforces the property: `if (hash != GPv2Order.hash(order, i_gpV2Settlement.domainSeparator())) revert InvalidOrderId(hash)`. The signature is decoded to `GPv2Order.Data` at L123, the hash is recomputed using the same settlement contract's domain separator (immutable, set at construction), and any mismatch causes an unconditional revert. There is no path through the function that bypasses this check.
